description_long: This is a vintage corded telephone with a solid wooden base and ornate metallic accents, reminiscent of early 20th-century designs. The base is square with decorative brass or bronze corner plates and a large, circular rotary dial on the front, featuring white number buttons and an intricate central medallion. The handset rests on a horizontal cradle supported by a central column, with two bell-shaped earpieces and a cylindrical grip, all made of matching metal and wood. A black, flexible cord connects the handset to the base, looping loosely to one side. The sides of the base feature metal handles, adding to the antique aesthetic and suggesting portability. The overall appearance is robust, elegant, and highly decorative, making it a striking object in any urban or domestic setting.
description: A vintage corded telephone with a wooden base, ornate metal accents, a rotary dial, and a classic handset connected by a black cord. The design is robust, decorative, and reminiscent of early 20th-century telephones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden base with a metal handle and the ornate central column supporting the handset cradle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handset, the connecting cord, and the detailed metalwork on the cradle.
description_view_2: Rear view with another metal handle and a clear view of the handset resting on the cradle, with the cord trailing behind.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rotary dial, ornate central medallion, and the handset on its cradle, with the cord visible.
